title: Get written landing-zone sign-off from Northwind

deadline.text: needed before the first cutover can be scheduled

sources.note: raised at the weekly vendor sync

acceptance_criteria: Landing-zone design document signed off by Northwind in writing
Sign-off references the agreed networking and backup configuration

latest_update.summary:
Verbal 'looks good' on the sync, but **no written sign-off yet**. Amir says the backup config needs one more internal review on their side.
- New promised date: 2026-06-04
- This is now past its own deadline — first cutover (0002) cannot be scheduled until it lands
